Who We Are

Trusted Source for Premium Indian Food Exports

Shritik Enterprises LLP is a certified manufacturer and exporter based in India, specialising in cashew kernels and dehydrated food ingredients for global food businesses.

With our integrated processing facilities, we control quality from raw material sourcing through final export packaging. Our products meet international food safety standards and are trusted by importers, distributors, and food manufacturers worldwide.

End-to-end in-house processing — no outsourcing
Flexible MOQ and private label capability
Consistent year-round supply with buffer stock
Dedicated export documentation support
Learn About Us
🥜

Cashew Kernels

W180 to W450 and all splits — the full range

🧅

Dehydrated Onion

White & red, all forms

🧄

Dehydrated Garlic

High allicin, all forms

🫚

Dehydrated Ginger

Natural gingerol retained

Our Range

Products We Export

All products are manufactured in-house, tested for international standards, and available in customised forms and packaging.

🥜

Cashew Kernels

Premium W180 to W450 grades and splits — whole, broken, and splits for snacking, confectionery, and food processing.

W180W240W320W450Splits
View Details
🧅

Dehydrated Onion

Flakes, minced, granules, and powder in white and red varieties. Consistent colour, pungency, and rehydration ratio.

FlakesMincedGranulesPowder
View Details
🧄

Dehydrated Garlic

Flakes, granules, minced, and powder with high allicin content. Ideal for seasonings, sauces, and ready meals.

FlakesGranulesMincedPowder
View Details
🫚

Dehydrated Ginger

Slices, flakes, granules, and powder retaining natural gingerol. Used in beverages, bakery, and health products.

SlicesFlakesGranulesPowder
View Details
All Products

Why Shritik

Why Buyers Choose Us

From manufacturing to shipment, we deliver more than products — we deliver confidence.

Integrated Manufacturing

Own processing units for cashews and dehydrated vegetables — no middlemen, consistent supply.

Certified Quality

FSSAI, APEDA, IEC, ISO, Halal, and Kosher certified. Rigorous QC at every production stage.

Custom Packaging

Flexible MOQs with private label, bulk, and retail-ready packaging options for any market.

Global Export Expertise

Serving buyers in Middle East, Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, and Africa.

Reliable Logistics

Experienced in international shipping, documentation, and on-time delivery commitments.

Dedicated Support

Dedicated export managers for each account. Responsive, solution-focused service.

Verified Standards

Internationally Certified

Our certifications reflect our commitment to food safety, traceability, and compliance with global import requirements.

FSSAI
APEDA
IEC
ISO
Halal
Kosher
